name: Chocolate Cherry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients and stir by hand until moistened and mixed well.
2. Add the cherry pie filling and mix gently.
3. Pour the batter into a greased and floured bundt cake pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 1 hour, or until done.
5. To make this a yellow cake, use a yellow cake mix and omit the chocolate chips.
Peggie Patton
Possum Kingdom Lake Cookbook
